sb_prompt: FIND OUT WHAT KIND OF PETS THE OTHER CALLER HAS.
raw_output:
ParticipantA: Hi, how are you doing today?
ParticipantB: I'm doing pretty good, thanks. How about you?
ParticipantA: I'm doing well, thanks. So, I was wondering, what kind of pets do you have?
ParticipantB: Oh, I actually don't have any pets right now.
ParticipantA: Oh, that's too bad. I have a cat at home.
ParticipantB: Yeah, I used to have a cat years ago, but she passed away.
ParticipantA: I'm sorry to hear that. Losing a pet is really hard.
ParticipantB: Yeah, it really is. But, I have a friend who has a dog and I help take care of him sometimes.
ParticipantA: Oh, that's nice of you. What kind of dog does your friend have?
ParticipantB: He has a golden retriever. He's such a sweet dog and loves to play fetch.
ParticipantA: That sounds like a lot of fun. I've always been more of a cat person, but I can see how a dog could be really enjoyable too.
ParticipantB: Yeah, I think so too. I've always been more of a dog person, but I think cats are pretty great too.
ParticipantA: Agreed. Do you have any other pets in mind that you would like to have in the future?
ParticipantB: Honestly, I've been thinking about getting a second dog, but I'm not sure yet.
ParticipantA: Yeah, getting a new pet can be a big decision. I'm happy with just my one cat for now.
ParticipantB: Yeah, I feel the same way. Well, it was nice talking to you.
ParticipantA: Yes, likewise. Have a great day!
